# GameCenterMatchmakingTeamCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.RuleSet

**Object**

The relationship to the rule set that you provide when you create a team.

## Declaration

```swift
object GameCenterMatchmakingTeamCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.RuleSet
```

## Objects

- **GameCenterMatchmakingTeamCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.RuleSet.Data**: The type and ID for the rule set that you’re adding the team to.
